ChangeRequest.name: Attribute `Securities financing transaction (SFT)`.`Legal final maturity date` should be moved down (in the SFT entity hierarchy)
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
The attribute `Legal final maturity` is present in multiple levels of the `Securities financing transaction (SFT)` hierarchy, specifically `Securities financing transaction (SFT)`.`Legal final maturity` but also `Term repurchase agreement instrument`.`Legal final maturity` where `Term repurchase agreement instrument` is a subtype of `Securities financing transaction (SFT)`. Fix required.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Description of change request
Move the attribute `Securities financing transaction (SFT)`.`Legal final maturity date` to the `Security borrowing and lending transaction` entity type.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Securities financing transaction (SFT)` * `Security borrowing and lending transaction`
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
